title: Semantic retrieval (embeddings) for knowledge-source nodes

gap_confirmed.rpc_exists: match_kg_nodes (cosine <=> , vector(768), filters embedding IS NOT NULL)

backfillKnowledgeEmbeddings.description: Generates and stores embeddings for null-embedding nodes in given source_doc_ids
backfillKnowledgeEmbeddings.model: gemini-embedding-001 (free, 768-dim) via existing embedText() -- same model as rest of graph so vectors are comparable

searchKnowledgeGraph.note: UNCHANGED -- already hybrid (semantic via match_kg_nodes RPC -> keyword ILIKE fallback). Gap was the missing embeddings, not the search code.

future_ingest.note: Already covered -- populateGraph() calls embedText() on every new node insert.

covers: hybrid routing: semantic >= 2 hits -> use semantic
hybrid routing: <2 hits / error -> keyword fallback
backfill accounting: all-success, partial-fail, empty, all-fail
CV content sanity: 'management' in content (not label) -> keyword miss on label but sem/content hit
careem node: 'team' in content (not label) -> same pattern

model_note: Brief specified text-embedding-004; used gemini-embedding-001 instead because: (1) existing graph nodes use gemini-embedding-001 -- mixing models produces incompatible vectors; (2) both are free tier; (3) user can override via GRAPH_EMBED_MODEL=text-embedding-004 env var + re-embed sweep if they want to migrate later.

live_test.step2: M8 chat: 'what does my CV say about team leadership' -- expect nine-core-competencies-ops-supply node
